repo_notes.author: Lampac maintainers
repo_notes.content:
Repository: Lampac Next Generation — self-hosted ASP.NET Core (.NET 10) backend that extends the Lampa TV client via plugin JSON APIs and optional browser automation. Default port 9118.

SOURCE LAYOUT (this tree): Core/ (host, Program/Startup, middleware, Core/wwwroot for SISI SPA fragments, stats, buy pages, Core/plugins for NWS/RCH clients); Shared/ (cross-cutting library: CoreInit, AppConf models, BaseController, HTTP pools, caching, Playwright, module loading hooks); Online/ (VOD core: online.js, shared controllers, ModInit); SISI/ (18+ core: sisi.js, SQLite bookmarks/history, SisiApi — individual adult SITE implementations live under Modules/Adult/<Name>/, one project per provider); Modules/ (feature modules: Catalog, JacRed, DLNA, LampaWeb, NextHUB, TorrServer, Transcoding, Tracks, Sync subtree, AdminPanel, Kit, ExternalBind, Community/TelegramAuth*, Proxy/TmdbProxy and CubProxy, WatchTogether, PidTor, WebLog, plus all OnlineRUS/OnlinePaid/OnlineAnime/OnlineENG/OnlineUKR/OnlineGEO provider projects); TestModules/ (samples published under mods/); config/ (example init.conf / base.conf).

RUNTIME VS REPO: After dotnet publish, Core.csproj copies module sources into module/ and mods/ next to Core.dll; precompiled assemblies also load from runtimes/references/. User overlays go in mods/. Each loadable unit uses manifest.json with "enable": true|false and typically ModInit.cs implementing Shared module interfaces (e.g. IModuleLoaded / IModuleConfigure).

DOCUMENTATION PRIORITIES: (1) Explain how Core wires middleware and discovers modules. (2) Map Online/ + Modules/Online* to Lampa plugin routes and provider patterns (ModInit, Controller, manifest). (3) Split SISI/ (shared 18+ pipeline) vs Modules/Adult/* (per-site routes). (4) NextHUB YAML under Modules/NextHUB/sites/. (5) Docker: Dockerfile and docker-compose.yaml at REPO ROOT (there is no docker/ directory). (6) CI: .github/workflows. (7) When describing static assets, distinguish Core/wwwroot from plugin JS under Modules/LampaWeb/plugins and Core/plugins — do not treat every SVG under wwwroot as architectural signal.

ANTI-PATTERNS: Do not describe a simplified "modules-only" workspace; Core and Shared are in-repo. Do not merge Kit/AdminPanel security details with generic API docs — call out auth paths and accsdb/WAF from Shared models. Keep config examples non-secret (no real tokens).

pages.title: Lampac NextGen — Project Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction: self-hosted .NET 10 media-aggregator backend for Lampa; how Core, Shared, Online, SISI, and Modules cooperate; default port 9118; link to child sections and to README architecture diagram.

pages.title: Getting Started, Docker & Repository Layout
pages.purpose: Installation: Dockerfile and root-level docker-compose.yaml / docker-compose.dev.yaml (no docker/ directory), install.sh / build.sh, default port 9118. Configuration: config/ examples and runtime init.conf / init.yaml, passwd, accsdb. Repository map: Core/, Shared/, Online/, SISI/, Modules/, TestModules/, NextGen.slnx, .github/workflows — and how publish maps sources to module/ and mods/ via Core/Core.csproj.

pages.title: Core Application — Bootstrap & Request Pipeline
pages.purpose: Core project: Program.cs and Startup.cs, dynamic loading of module/ and mods/, relationship to Shared and runtimes/references/. Link to middleware, controllers, proxy, websockets, static files.

pages.title: Middleware Pipeline
pages.purpose: Each middleware in Core/Middlewares registered from Startup: responsibilities (WAF, accsdb, limits, static cache, headers, module integration, proxy image, etc.) and request ordering.

pages.title: Media Proxy Subsystem
pages.purpose: Core/Middlewares/ProxyMedia and related: HLS/DASH/MPD handling, ProxyAPI dispatch, ProxyLink encryption, buffering options from Shared server-proxy models.

pages.title: Core Controllers & API Endpoints
pages.purpose: Core/Controllers: version, geo, diagnostics, Chromium iframe, statistics, RCH ingestion — attribute routes and how they relate to Lampa and admin use cases.

pages.title: WebSocket & RCH (Remote Client Hub)
pages.purpose: Native WebSocket /nws path, RchClient bridging to HTTP, and Core/plugins JS clients (nws-client, invc variants) consumed by Lampa-side integrations.

pages.title: Static Assets & Web UI
pages.purpose: Core/wwwroot: SISI UI (sisi/), MSX assets, buy/, stats/; Core/plugins for server-delivered JS helpers. Contrast with Modules/LampaWeb/plugins (Lampa client plugin sources copied with that module).

pages.title: Shared Library — Services & Models
pages.purpose: Shared as the common library: BaseController, CoreInit, module interfaces, major service folders. Child pages for AppConf, HTTP, cache, pools, security, Playwright.

pages.title: Configuration Models (AppConf)
pages.purpose: Shared/Models/AppConf: listen, accsdb/WAF, online/sisi/kit/rch/cache/puppeteer/pool settings; how CoreInit loads init.conf / init.yaml and hot-reload events.

pages.title: HTTP Client & Request Services
pages.purpose: Shared HTTP helpers and named HttpClientFactory clients: proxy routing, headers, spans, and EventListener hooks used by Online/SISI scrapers.

pages.title: Caching — HybridCache & Staticache
pages.purpose: Hybrid file/memory caches, response caching, Staticache middleware and relevant AppConf keys (type, extend, memExtend).

pages.title: Object Pools & Performance Utilities
pages.purpose: Shared/Services/Pools and related performance types (buffers, JSON pools, streams) plus CSharpEval / Roslyn compilation used for runtime module compilation and NextHUB scripting.

pages.title: Security & Geo Utilities
pages.purpose: Crypto helpers, proxy link AES, GeoIP / CIDR matching, AccsDb resolution, Cloudflare IP lists — how they support WAF and access control without duplicating secret values.

pages.title: Playwright Browser Automation
pages.purpose: Playwright pools and contexts in Shared; how Online and SISI controllers request rendered pages when plain HTTP is insufficient.

pages.title: Online Module — Video Streaming Sources
pages.purpose: Online/ project: ModInit, online.js plugin surface, OnlineApi, relationship to per-provider projects under Modules/OnlineRUS, OnlinePaid, OnlineAnime, OnlineENG, OnlineUKR, OnlineGEO.

pages.title: Online Controller Architecture & Base Classes
pages.purpose: Patterns for VOD controllers in Online/ and Modules/Online*: base classes, episode/season resolution, subtitles, spider/search, SQL cache under Online/SQL if present, shared services.

pages.title: Supported Streaming Providers
pages.purpose: Catalog by folder: Modules/OnlineRUS, OnlinePaid, OnlineAnime, OnlineENG, OnlineUKR, OnlineGEO — representative providers (Rezka, Filmix, Kodik, HDVB, Collaps, VidSrc, Kinoflix, etc.) and where per-provider config lives (Online/Config and module ModuleConf).

pages.title: SISI Module — Adult Content Aggregator
pages.purpose: SISI/ core: plugins (sisi.js), SQLite persistence, WAF limits, SisiApi entry — explicitly state that each third-party SITE integration is a separate project under Modules/Adult/<SiteName>/.

pages.title: SISI Controllers & Site Integrations
pages.purpose: Document Modules/Adult/* projects (manifest, ModInit, Controller/Service patterns), bookmark/history flow through SISI core, and route naming conventions; reference SISI/README.md route tables.

pages.title: NextHUB — Dynamic YAML-Driven Site Engine
pages.purpose: Modules/NextHUB: sites/*.yaml, ListController/ViewController, Roslyn-evaluated scripts, integration with Playwright; how to add a site YAML safely.

pages.title: Modules — Pluggable Feature Extensions
pages.purpose: Cross-cutting module loading: manifest.json, IModuleLoaded/IModuleConfigure, FileSystemWatcher hot reload, ApplicationPartManager. Overview of major module families with links to child pages.

pages.title: Catalog Module
pages.purpose: Modules/Catalog: YAML sites under sites/, catalog plugin endpoints, list/card controllers and mapping to online sources.

pages.title: JacRed Module — Torrent Indexer Proxy
pages.purpose: Modules/JacRed: Jackett-compatible API, engines, models, tracker-specific code under Controllers and Engine.

pages.title: DLNA Module — Local Media Server
pages.purpose: Modules/DLNA: torrent integration, local browsing, thumbnails, UPnP/DLNA discovery, background jobs.

pages.title: LampaWeb, Sync, Community, Proxies & Satellite Modules
pages.purpose: Modules/LampaWeb (Lampa UI/plugin hosting, lampainit.js family, telegram gate plugins). Modules/Sync subtree (sync.js, bookmarks, storage, timecode). Modules/Community/TelegramAuth and TelegramAuthBot (HTTP API, bot sessions — link Community READMEs). Modules/Proxy/TmdbProxy and CubProxy. TorrServer, Transcoding, Tracks, WebLog, WatchTogether, PidTor — each: manifest, ModInit, main routes or jobs.

pages.title: AdminPanel Module — Web Configuration UI
pages.purpose: Modules/AdminPanel: /adminpanel UI, API for reading/patching init sections, auth model — align with mods/AdminPanel README conventions if present in tree.

pages.title: ExternalBind Module — Remote Device Binding
pages.purpose: Modules/ExternalBind: EventListener hooks, IsLocalIp overrides for lite bind routes, security notes and manifest defaults (often disabled).

pages.title: Kit Module — Encrypted User Configuration & Service Binding
pages.purpose: Modules/Kit: encrypted kit store, unite flows, BindController for third-party OAuth/credentials; storage paths and consumption by paid provider modules.
